title: The Prompt Engineering Playbook: 11 Patterns That Work on Every LLM in 2026
preview_text:
Most people prompt like they text a friend.
"Hey can you help me with this?"
That works for simple tasks. It breaks the second you need consistency, structure, or quality across hundreds of runs.
